name: bl_cop_InTest_testInOperator

adaptation: stripped inert stmt: boolean test = $name != null
stripped inert stmt: boolean test = $name != null

drl:
rule "test in"
when
    Person( $name : name in ("bob", "mark") )
then  end
rule "test not in"
when
    Person( $name : name not in ("joe", "doe") )
then  end
